hero.title: Where Nature Meets Coffee
hero.subtitle: Experience a tranquil garden retreat in the heart of the city, where every cup is a journey back to stillness.

featured.name: Signature Egg Coffee
featured.desc: Rich, silky egg cream layered over bold Robusta coffee for a refined take on a beloved tradition.

items.name: Iced Black Coffee
items.desc: Brewed from premium Arabica beans with a lingering sweet finish.

items.name: Bac Xiu with Grass Jelly
items.desc: Condensed milk and coffee paired with cool, chewy grass jelly.

gallery.title: A Peaceful Space
gallery.subtitle: Every corner of Garden Sanctuary is thoughtfully crafted to bring you complete ease of mind.

items.name: Minh Anh
items.quote: Garden Sanctuary is where I always come to focus on my work. The lush green space keeps my mind refreshed.

items.name: Hoang Nam
items.quote: The coffee here is genuinely excellent. Bold flavor paired with warm, professional service.

items.name: Thao Vy
items.quote: The lighting and every decor corner at Garden photograph beautifully. A wonderful spot for aesthetics lovers.
